# xui_trojan_client (Resource)

Trojan user (client) on an existing 3x-ui inbound. Managed via `/panel/api/clients/*` (add, get, update, del).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Unique client email / label in the panel.
- `inbound_id` (Number) Panel inbound id (number from URL / API).

### Optional

- `comment` (String)
- `enable` (Boolean)
- `expiry_time` (Number) Expiry in milliseconds since Unix epoch (0 = never).
- `limit_ip` (Number)
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Trojan client password. If omitted, the panel generates one on create.
- `reset` (Number)
- `sub_id` (String)
- `tg_id` (Number)
- `total_gb` (Number) Traffic limit in **bytes** (panel field `totalGB`; 0 = unlimited).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Client password from the panel (server-generated unless `password` is set).
